text: 35 mm AFLEX100 ArthroFlex Decellularized Dermis with MATRACELL, 1.26 - 1.75 mm thickness, 40 x 70 mm AFLEX101 ArthroFlex Decellularized Dermis with MATRACELL, 1.76 - 2.25 mm thickness, 35 x 35 mm AFLEX200 SpeedBridge™ Implant System: The SpeedBridge™ Implant System is a single convenience package that contains all implants and FiberTapes needed for a standard four-anchor SpeedBridge construct.
